tasks.title: ⚠️ URGENT: Update Meta/Instagram ad URL
tasks.description: Meta/Instagram ads still pointing to /revision-for-leaving-cert-2026/ instead of optimised /revision-for-leaving-cert-2026-parents-b/ page. Update immediately to fix conversion leak.

tasks.title: Fix /nogo/ page dead end
tasks.description: Paywall redirect page has no CTA or link back to course. 275 sessions/month hit this page with 17.5% bounce. Add a clear "Get Access" button linking to the relevant course.

tasks.title: Fix checkout conversion gap
tasks.description: Course pages get 9,800+ sessions but checkout only gets 1,635 (~17%). Add CTAs, urgency elements, and reduce friction on course pages.

tasks.title: Make phone number a clickable tel: link
tasks.description: Phone number on website should be a tel: link so mobile users can tap to call. Critical for parent conversion on mobile.

tasks.title: Add CTA buttons above fold on landing pages
tasks.description: All 3 revision landing pages need strong CTAs visible without scrolling. Currently visitors have to scroll to find the form.

tasks.title: Fix order confirmation message
tasks.description: Replace generic "Thanks for purchasing!" with personalised welcome: "Welcome to Leamy Maths! Here's what to do next..." with clear next steps and upsell prompt.

tasks.title: SEO audit — optimise for Limerick maths grinds
tasks.description: Full SEO audit targeting "maths grinds Limerick", "leaving cert maths grinds", etc. Also fix old /2020 dates in course names making site look abandoned.

tasks.title: Email marketing setup
tasks.description: Set up email nurture sequence for leads who don't buy. Lead magnet (free sample lesson or PDF cheat sheet) + automated welcome sequence.
